flows.title: Run container via compose (env + trust store)

adrs.title: env_file + volume mount for secrets & trust store (NOT baked-in)
Swagger UI path under permitAll (v1), prod gating deferred

open_questions.summary: springdoc-openapi version compatible with Spring Boot 4.1.1-SNAPSHOT
open_questions.fallback_if_wrong: blocking — request PO/architect to pin a Boot-4-compatible springdoc version

open_questions.summary: Container port (default 8080 vs override) + SERVER_PORT wiring
Trust store path inside container (mount target) + reconcile run-app.sh host logic
PostgreSQL in compose: real DB service vs env-only wiring to existing newmojf UAT
open_questions.recommendation: env-only wiring to existing newmojf UAT (no postgres service in compose) — app already connects to 10.95.1.43 via SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL
open_questions.rationale: codebase-map §4 + .env.example:7 show the app already wires to the existing UAT DB via env; a local postgres service is optional dev convenience, not a blocker
open_questions.fallback_if_wrong: env-only wiring to existing newmojf UAT (no postgres service in compose)

open_questions.summary: Swagger UI prod gating (disable in prod profile? security exposure of docs)
open_questions.recommendation: disable Swagger UI in prod profile via springdoc.swagger-ui.enabled=false; keep spec at /v3/api-docs internal
open_questions.rationale: LoginRequest.pass field is documented; reduce prod attack surface by hiding interactive UI while keeping the JSON spec for tooling
open_questions.fallback_if_wrong: blocking — confirm prod docs exposure policy with PO

open_questions.summary: JVM memory/CPU resource limits for the container
Success metrics / acceptance thresholds for containerized (quantitative)
open_questions.recommendation: no quantitative threshold; functional DoD (Flows 1-5) only
open_questions.rationale: brief is silent on metrics; the epic's Definition of Done (Flows 1-5) is functional, not quantitative — blocking was internally contradictory with P3
open_questions.fallback_if_wrong: no quantitative threshold; functional DoD (Flows 1-5) only

open_questions.summary: actuator endpoint exposure surface (health only vs full) given SecurityConfig permitAll rules
CORS origins externalization — SecurityConfig.java:89 hardcodes localhost:3000/8080; container/prod MUST override via ${CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS} placeholder
open_questions.recommendation: externalize CORS allowed origins to ${CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS} env placeholder in application-prod.yaml; keep localhost defaults in application-dev.yaml
open_questions.rationale: container/prod browser clients hit CORS rejection from hardcoded localhost origins; profile-driven externalization is the 12-factor pattern
open_questions.fallback_if_wrong: blocking — confirm prod CORS origin policy with PO

materialized: misclassification: OQ-AP-7 blocking→recommend + fallback (functional DoD only)
coverage_gap: Auto-Classification Review criterion clarified (low-conf blocking only)
coverage_gap: CORS hardcoded-origins coupling acknowledged in 02-architecture
coverage_gap: 'surfaced as OQs' reworded to 'known codebase gap' in 00-index
coverage_gap: curl-on-JRE healthcheck caveat noted in 02-architecture + 04-flows
